title: Crakz's Modpack
description: This is going to be a modpack heavily performance based but still keeping qol features for different gamemodes (CrystalPvP, NethPot, DiaPot, etc.)
body:
Crakz's Modpack is a performance-focused Minecraft modpack designed for competitive PvP players who want maximum FPS without sacrificing essential Quality of Life features.

Built with fast-paced PvP gamemodes in mind, this pack is optimized for smooth gameplay in modes such as Crystal PvP, Netherite Pot PvP, and Diamond Pot PvP, while still keeping a smooth and lightweight experience

⚙️ Features
🚀 High Performance Optimization – Carefully selected mods to maximize FPS and reduce lag
🎯 PvP-Ready Setup – Built for competitive gamemodes like Crystal, NethPot, and DiaPot
🧰 Quality of Life Improvements – Essential tools and client-side enhancements to improve gameplay without changing vanilla mechanics
🎮 Fair & Allowed Mods – All included mods are intended to comply with major PvP tierlists and server rules

💡 Intendend

This modpack is designed for players who want a clean, optimized PvP experience with no unnecessary clutter — just performance, responsiveness, and essential tools for competitive play.

📌 Notes

If you believe any mod included is not be allowed on major tierlists, please contact Fyzrrr on Discord or join my Discord server to report it.
